Notice Of Motion And Motion For Charging Order Against Judgment Debtors Interest In Terra Incognita Capital, Llc.
Off Calendar Nov-09-2021 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF NOAH ROSENKRANTZ'S Motion For Charging Order Against Judgment Debtors Interest In Terra Incognita Capital, LLC is denied without prejudice. Plaintiff fails to present substantial evidence that defendant Christopher Mayo has an interest in Terra Incognita Capital, LLC to warrant a charging order. Plaintiff's evidence of defendant's interest in the LLC is speculative. (See Rosenkrantz Decl., pars. 6-7.) The Court would deny this motion without prejudice even if the LLC did not file an opposition. In any event, at this stage of the proceedings, the more persuasive evidence is that defendant has no interest in the entity. (See Erik Mayo Decl.)

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
